name: future-unknown-event
_note: Intentionally-unknown event types a future Hermes might emit. The contract: each -> unsupported with rawType set (never undefined, never a dropped sentinel), and the carried payload is sanitized. This is the regression net that proves a Hermes upgrade is VISIBLE, not silently ignored. SECURITY: the second frame hides a long token under a benign `note` key; the sanitized payload must not contain it. Token is an OBVIOUSLY FAKE placeholder.
